reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers of this game, please continue to improve the game, 
More colorful targets to cut, more levels selections to play and more weapons selections to use if possible.   Keep up the good work. Thank you

5 stars for the price !!!!Great game simple and a bit addictive  family fun 
Graphics prettygood. Mechanics seem compliable. Simple fun way to work the arm muscles cannot go wrong for price. Try it!!!!

My biggest issue with this game is that half the time I slice through fruit the fruit doesn't get sliced. I also sometimes slice fruit before it's even gotten close to me. I also got a score over 500 on the second level but it didn't proceed me to a new stage so now I feel like I have no more reason to play the game. Hope the devs can give the this game the proper TLC that it needs. If I had an ideal hope for the future would also be that the fruit actually gets more thrown or lobbed at you instead of floating towards you, and I would also love if they came at variable speeds and not all at once at the same speed. 3 stars for the novelty of the idea and partial execution but realistically deserves 2 in this state.
